overflow_visible_office_floor.note: Carlos finally applied overflow:hidden. STRIKE ENDED. It only took 11 consecutive reviews.

triple_visibilitychange_listeners.note: Consolidated to a single handler with proper cleanup. STRIKE ENDED.

completionToast_inline_styles.note: App.jsx lines 1149-1173. 23 lines of inline CSS instead of a CSS class. Still there. Still terrible.

sparkleUnseen_missing_setter.note: setSparkleUnseen now exists at line 735. STRIKE ENDED.

activity_filter_role_radio_on_button.note: App.jsx lines 1364-1391. <button role='radio'> inside radiogroup. Radiogroup keyboard nav (arrow keys) not implemented.

plantToast_inline_styles.note: Office.jsx lines 1307-1331. Same anti-pattern as completionToast — 22 lines of inline CSS. Two inline-style toasts, zero CSS classes.

meta.sofia_commentary: Carlos fixed 3 longstanding STRIKE-level bugs in this cycle. Actual progress. I'm cautiously optimistic — but two inline-style toasts and a role=radio situation still need to go.

visual_ui.notes: Desktop and dashboard views look sharp. Mobile speech bubble escapes the office floor boundary and overlaps the tab toggle area — Bloberto's vibe transition quote ('Night crew came to work') appears above the floor container on mobile, betraying the brand-new overflow:hidden fix.

accessibility.notes: ARIA tabpanels now correctly use HTML `hidden` attribute — that's genuinely fixed. But <button role='radio'> in activity filter radiogroups still breaks keyboard navigation (arrow keys do nothing; ARIA expects arrow-key traversal within radiogroup). The office floor has role='region' with a good aria-label, which is solid.

performance_code_quality.notes: Duplicate CSS rules on .office-floor[data-vibe] — single-quote versions (lines 91-95) AND double-quote versions (lines 97-115) both define the same selectors. First set is incomplete (missing --grid-line). Classic copy-paste residue. Both completionToast and plantToast are rendered with 20+ line inline style objects instead of CSS classes.

bugs_correctness.notes: Core poll loop, fetch logic, hash-tab sync, and worker cinematic entry/exit all look correct. stuckWorkers useMemo includes `tick` in deps correctly (from useTimeTick). No logic regressions found. Activity log count header correctly reflects actual data.

mobile_responsiveness.notes: Despite the overflow:hidden fix, Bloberto's speech bubble (position:absolute, bottom:calc(100%+8px)) escapes the floor on mobile when character is near top:4% AND the manager-wobble animation uses CSS transforms creating a new stacking context. Confirmed in qa64-mobile.png screenshot. Office floor sizing looks okay otherwise.

state_management.notes: Polling, idling, vibe history, streak, fading workers — all structurally sound. Single consolidated visibilitychange handler is now correct. Minor: useEffect deps [onResume, syncFromGitHub] includes both when onResume already wraps syncFromGitHub — causes double re-registration when either identity changes, though in practice both are stable useCallback refs so this is low risk.

animation_polish.notes: VibeShockwave, progress ring completions, ambient particles — all polished. The manager-wobble transform animation is clean. Worker entry/exit transitions are smooth. No new animation regressions found.

code_organization.notes: App.jsx is 1424 lines, Office.jsx is 1659 lines with no decomposition. Inline style blobs (completionToast, plantToast) are noise. Duplicate CSS vibe rules add bloat. The WORKER_ERROR_BUBBLES constant at line 1138 is used at line 595 in Office.jsx — while technically fine (JS hoisting of const doesn't apply but runtime order does), it reads backwards.

bugs.title: completionToast rendered with 23-line inline style object
bugs.description: The completion toast (and streak eulogy toast) is rendered as a div with a massive inline style object. position, bottom, left, transform, background, border, borderRadius, padding, fontSize, fontWeight, color, boxShadow, zIndex, whiteSpace, pointerEvents, and animation are all inline. This should be a CSS class. It's now on strike 12.
bugs.fix: Extract to .completion-toast CSS class in App.css. Dynamic values (border color, box shadow color based on completionToast.color) can use CSS custom properties.

bugs.title: plantToast rendered with 22-line inline style object (same anti-pattern as QA64-001)
bugs.description: The ficus-milestone toast in Office.jsx is a carbon copy of the completionToast inline style anti-pattern — 22 lines of inline CSS. Two separate files, same mistake. At least they're consistent in being wrong.
bugs.fix: Extract to .plant-toast CSS class. The border and glow are always green (#22c55e) so no dynamic color needed.

bugs.title: Activity filter buttons use role='radio' on <button> without arrow-key navigation
bugs.description: <button role='radio'> elements are inside role='radiogroup' divs. ARIA radiogroup requires keyboard users to navigate with arrow keys between options, but there is no onKeyDown handler for ArrowLeft/ArrowRight/ArrowUp/ArrowDown on these buttons. Tab-key navigation still works, but screen reader users expecting radiogroup behavior will be confused.
bugs.fix: Either (a) implement arrow-key navigation for the radiogroup, or (b) remove role='radio'/'radiogroup' and keep them as plain buttons in a toolbar (role='toolbar'), or (c) use real <input type='radio'> elements.

bugs.title: Bloberto speech bubble escapes office-floor boundary on mobile
bugs.description: Despite overflow:hidden being correctly applied to .office-floor (great fix, Carlos), Bloberto's speech bubble still visually appears ABOVE the floor boundary and overlaps the tab toggle area on mobile. The .char--manager element has animation:manager-wobble which uses CSS transforms (rotate+scale), creating a new stacking/containing context. The speech bubble (position:absolute; bottom:calc(100%+8px)) extends ~28px above a character placed at top:4% of the floor, which on small screens exceeds the floor's top edge. Confirmed visually in qa64-mobile.png.
bugs.fix: Two options: (1) Add overflow:hidden to .office-wrap as well to catch anything escaping the floor wrapper, or (2) Clamp the speech bubble position — add max(calc(100% + 8px), ...) or clip it with a data-attribute check when character is near the top.

bugs.title: Duplicate CSS rules for .office-floor[data-vibe] in Office.css
bugs.description: Office.css defines .office-floor[data-vibe='crushing'] etc. at lines 91-95 (single quotes) AND again at lines 97-115 (double quotes). Both attribute selector quote styles are valid CSS and match the same elements. The first set is INCOMPLETE (only border-color and box-shadow, missing --grid-line custom property). The second set is the canonical one. The first set is dead/redundant weight that survived refactoring.
bugs.fix: Delete lines 91-95 (the single-quoted incomplete duplicates). Keep lines 97-115.

bugs.title: lone-survivor-label rendered with full inline styles instead of CSS class
bugs.description: The lone-survivor label div has fontSize, opacity, position, bottom, left, transform, whiteSpace, and color all as inline styles. A CSS class exists in the JSX className ('lone-survivor-label') but it contains no styles — all styling is inline. This is the third inline-style block that should be a CSS rule.
bugs.fix: Move the inline styles to .lone-survivor-label in Office.css.

fixes_confirmed.title: overflow:hidden now correctly applied to .office-floor
fixes_confirmed.note: FINALLY. 11 strikes. Took 11 consecutive QA reviews to fix a one-word CSS change. The universe has been restored. The grid no longer bleeds.

fixes_confirmed.title: Triple visibilitychange listeners consolidated to single handler
fixes_confirmed.note: Single consolidated handler now correctly manages poll interval reset, tab-switch resume, and title animation. Clean and correct. STRIKE ENDED.

fixes_confirmed.title: sparkleUnseen now has its setter (setSparkleUnseen)
fixes_confirmed.note: useState now properly destructures both value and setter. The footer sparkle twinkle can now actually stop twinkling when clicked.

visual_observations.desktop: Clean layout. Dashboard stats correct (3 on clock, 2 active, 1 idle). Carlos card shows 'Fix 3 CRITICAL + 4 HIGH bugs from QA #63' — he's working on it. Office view renders correctly with proper border containment.
visual_observations.mobile: Tab toggle renders, office floor scales appropriately. Bloberto's vibe transition speech bubble ('Night crew came to work. Respect. 🫡') visible above the floor boundary and overlapping the tab toggle area — regression or existing pre-fix behavior confirmed on mobile viewport.
visual_observations.dashboard: StatsBar: 3/3 correct. Worker cards: all three (Luna, Sofia, Carlos) showing accurate status and task info. Activity log visible with correct 'Latest 20 of 50 events' count. Filter bars functional.

summary: Review #64 brings real progress: 3 STRIKE-level bugs fixed after 11 consecutive no-fix cycles. The overflow:hidden and single visibilitychange handler fixes are meaningful improvements. However, 3 carry-over bugs persist (two inline-style toast blobs, broken radiogroup keyboard nav), and 3 new bugs were found — most notably the speech bubble still escaping the floor boundary on mobile despite the overflow fix. Carlos is actively working on QA #63 critical bugs. Net improvement: +0.2 points. Still work to do.
